expectations.evidence: myproject/turbodocx.py exists as a TurboPartner config file
turbopartner/views.py exists with create_organization and list_organizations views
turbopartner/urls.py defines urlpatterns and myproject/urls.py includes it via path('api/organizations/', include('turbopartner.urls'))
turbopartner/views.py uses @api_view decorators from rest_framework, Response class, and Django URL patterns in urls.py
No file contains APIRouter, FastAPI(), or @app.post patterns
No file contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY in .env or .env.example. Only partner vars are present.
